name: Sinclair, Inc.
summary: PARTI Sinclair, Inc. (the Company or Sinclair), a Maryland corporation formed in 2022, is the parent company of Sinclair Broadcast Group, LLC (SBG), a Maryland limited liability company, which formed from the conversion of Sinclair Broadcast Group, Inc. (Old Sinclair), a Maryland corporation founded in 1986, to a Maryland limited liability company in 2023. Refer to Company Reorganization in this Item 1 . Sinclair is a diversified media company with national reach and a strong focus on providing ...
